name: Payment instruction release
description: Create, validate and release approved SEPA or SWIFT payment instructions.

name: Compliance GO or NO-GO decision
description: Review sanctions, AML, restricted parties and unusual-risk alerts before payment release.

name: Market-abuse alert review
description: Assess surveillance alerts and document compliance outcomes.

name: Settlement verification
description: Confirm settlement completion and investigate mismatches.

name: External feed quality
description: Maintain input pipelines and monitor data-quality assurance.

name: Level 1 and Level 2 support
description: Triage incidents, requests and user issues affecting teams.

name: Ticketing platform operation
description: Maintain ticket tracking, workflow and resolution evidence.

name: Identity and permission governance
description: Maintain identity lifecycle, entitlements and reviews.

name: Technology innovation
description: Explore, design and prototype potential future systems.

name: DORA oversight
description: Monitor ICT asset, dependency and resilience governance.

name: GDPR oversight
description: Monitor data-processing governance and privacy controls.

name: IT system ownership
description: Accountable for technical health and delivery of a system.

name: Business system ownership
description: Accountable for business purpose, use and release policy of a system.
